name: Sticky Pecan Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup plus 2 tablespoons cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
Grease a 9-inch square pan.
For crust: Put flour, sugar and salt in a food processor and pulse until blended. With the processor running, gradually add butter through the feed tube; process until blended. Turn out into prepared pan and gather dough. Flatten and press evenly over the bottom of the pan, forming a 1/2-inch edge up the sides of the pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
For filling: Stir brown sugar and flour in a medium bowl until blended. Add corn syrup, eggs and vanilla; whisk until well blended.
Spread pecans in an even layer over the partially baked crust. Pour filling over pecans.
Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Bake for 25 minutes or until filling is firm. Cool on a wire rack before cutting into bars.
